## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows WordPress Coding Standards
- [ ] All user input is sanitized
- [ ] All HTML output is escaped (`esc_html`, `esc_attr`, `esc_url`)
- [ ] No `eval()`, `exec()`, `shell_exec()`, or `unserialize()` on user data
- [ ] I have tested this on a real WordPress + WooCommerce installation
- [ ] CI checks pass
